query: WITH latest_er AS (SELECT er.* FROM cpa_evaluation_results er INNER JOIN (SELECT project_consultant_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM cpa_evaluation_results GROUP BY project_consultant_id) mx ON er.id = mx.max_id) SELECT pc.id, pc.consultant_id, pc.status, cm.legal_name, cm.code as consultant_code, ler.total_true_cost, ler.`rank` as result_rank, ler.can_rank FROM cpa_project_consultants pc JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id LEFT JOIN latest_er ler ON ler.project_consultant_id = pc.id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 90001 ORDER BY COALESCE(ler.`rank`, 999), pc.created_at;
